scripts.test:qa: cross-env ENV=qa      npm run clean:results && playwright test
scripts.test:qa:sanity: cross-env ENV=qa      npm run clean:results && playwright test --grep @sanity
scripts.test:qa:regression: cross-env ENV=qa      npm run clean:results && playwright test --grep @regression
scripts.test:staging: cross-env ENV=staging npm run clean:results && playwright test
scripts.test:staging:sanity: cross-env ENV=staging npm run clean:results && playwright test --grep @sanity
scripts.test:staging:regression: cross-env ENV=staging npm run clean:results && playwright test --grep @regression
scripts.test:prod: cross-env ENV=prod    npm run clean:results && playwright test --grep @sanity
